meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome can't deploy apps. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: SaaS Starter Kit: Deploy Apps Fast for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use this advanced SaaS starter kit checklist with Antigravity and Claude Code to ship production-ready apps for clients today.
content.answer_block: Deploying apps shouldn't be a bottleneck. By utilizing a standardized SaaS starter kit, you encapsulate infrastructure, auth, and database logic into a repeatable template. Combine this with Antigravity for automated boilerplate generation and Claude Code for iterative refinement to move from local development to production in minutes, not days.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client is waiting, the scope is creeping, and you’re still wrestling with environment variables, database migrations, and CI/CD pipelines. You aren't building a product; you’re fighting infrastructure. It’s the silent killer of freelance profit margins—the moment you realize your technical debt is outpacing your delivery speed.

But the breakthrough isn't working harder; it’s working with a system. By treating your SaaS architecture as a modular, repeatable starter kit, you stop reinventing the wheel. With Antigravity and Claude Code as your force multipliers, you can automate the boilerplate and ship enterprise-grade deployments, turning hours of configuration into seconds of execution.

steps.title: Initialize SaaS Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your stack with a pre-configured starter kit to eliminate manual setup of auth, billing, and database schemas.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a SaaS starter kit including Next.js 14, Supabase auth, Stripe integration, and Tailwind CSS. Ensure strict TypeScript configuration.

steps.title: Configure Infrastructure-as-Code
steps.description: Define your deployment environment using IaC to ensure parity between local, staging, and production environments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Terraform module for Vercel/AWS deployment including database connection pooling and environment secret management.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Ensure zero-downtime updates by automating schema changes directly within your CI/CD pipeline.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Drizzle ORM migration script for a multi-tenant SaaS architecture including RLS policies for user isolation.

steps.title: Establish CI/CD Deployment Hooks
steps.description: Connect your repository to your hosting provider with automated testing triggers to prevent deployment failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing, linting, and deployment to Vercel/AWS upon merge to main.

steps.title: Verify Production Readiness
steps.description: Run an automated health check and smoke test suite to validate the deployment before client hand-off.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of Playwright tests to verify critical paths: Auth login, Stripe checkout flow, and dashboard data fetching.

pro_tips: Always use 'ephemeral environments' for feature branches to allow clients to preview changes without impacting production.
Inject secrets via CLI tools rather than hardcoding them in your repo to prevent catastrophic leaks.
Use database seeding scripts to generate realistic mock data for client demos immediately after deployment.
Implement 'feature flags' in your starter kit so you can deploy incomplete features to production safely.
Audit your bundle size during every build phase to ensure your starter kit remains performant as it scales.
content.next_steps: After completing your first automated deployment, document your custom configuration as a 'Golden Template' in a private repository to reuse for every future client engagement.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting infrastructure hold your business hostage. Implement these systems, automate your workflow, and reclaim your time. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
